metadata.title: Autonomous Research (R2)
metadata.description: The supercritical loop: when the model itself can design, run, and interpret ML experiments, the research loop closes inside the company and decouples from human pace.
metadata.author: Tracking AI Course

nodes.label: Model Capability
nodes.description: Aggregate quality of the frontier model.

nodes.label: Autonomous Research
nodes.description: The model's ability to design, run, and interpret its own ML experiments without a human in the loop.

nodes.label: Architecture Discovery
nodes.description: Rate at which novel model architectures, training recipes, and optimizations are found.

edges.description: More capable models can run more of their own research.
Autonomous experimentation finds new architectures faster than human researchers can.
New architectures and training recipes raise capability.

loops.label: R2: Autonomous Research (Supercritical)
loops.description: If this loop becomes self-sustaining, iteration speed exceeds the rate at which competitors can copy.
loops.behavior_pattern: Phase transition to internally self-sustaining capability growth.
